source: Curated from main 9c3b08fe37afe389c0c5a7487b5363cf902804fd with approved proposal 012 applied.
description: Shareable package for experiment-setup and experiment-loop, including frozen setup and human-use contracts, canonical human-feedback intake and disposition, deep Viewer, Evidence Gate, navigation judging, regeneration tooling, documentation, and Generated Examples.
notes: No private experiment artifacts, GIFs, Azure resources, credentials, or local user paths are included.
Each Example Prompt is maintained source; its committed generated/ directory is a disposable review snapshot.
The skill includes a human-review gate for durable changes to skills, rubrics, judge policy, and reusable instructions.
The companion setup skill produces an independently criticized brief and an approval record bound to the exact Prompt and brief hashes.
Ships references/evidence_gate as the single blocking experiment completion gate and scripts/skill_selftest.py as its batch adapter.
Ships references/navigation_judge as a locked Playwright/Chromium module for required Navigation Evidence.
Ships scripts/prepare_scratch.py in both skills for prompt-safe unattended Windows scratch paths.
Ships the standard Viewer adapter and shared dependency-free watch mode for incremental Manifest and human-feedback inspection; final Evidence Gate semantics are unchanged.
Ships immutable Viewer-native human-feedback intake and orchestrator disposition schemas, templates, semantic validation, Manifest linkage, and attended-mode protocol.

Ships explicit human-use applicability for physical and digital systems, selectable qualitative friction analysis and judging, prior-art functional-review provenance, and network-approval enforcement while preserving legacy briefs and Manifests.
